results.title: Defence Secretary John Healey's resignation letter in full
results.description: In a letter to Sir Keir Starmer, Mr Healey said the Prime Minister had been ‘unable, and the Treasury has been unwilling, to commit the resources that the nation needs to defend the country at this time of rising threats’

results.title: Smiles Galore As Shubman Gill’s Team India Fly To Dharamsala For 1st ODI Vs Afghanistan
results.description: India name ODI squad vs Afghanistan, with returns for Rohit Sharma, Ishan Kishan, Washington Sundar, and maiden call ups for Prince Yadav, Gurnoor Brar, Harsh Dubey

results.title: Riyan Parag undergoes shoulder surgery; likely to miss initial part of 2026-27 domestic season
results.description: Mumbai, Jun 11 (PTI) Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag successfully underwent a right shoulder surgery here on Thursday. Parag, who led the Royals to the IPL 2026 playoffs, went through the procedure at the Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital under the watch of Dr Dinshaw Pardiwalla. The all-rounder will soon begin his recuperation at the BCCI [...]
